testcases.description: StudioVerify if user able to launch the URL
testcases.raw: TC_01Sample Layer / TIGUI and FunctionalityStudioVerify if user able to launch the URL Launch the Studio URL "https: //qapartnerportal.kitaboo.com/reader/CL- ELA-master/#/login"Studio Listing page should display

testcases.expected: Click on activity Should be redirect to activity listing dashboard page

testcases.raw: TC_95Sample Layer / TIGFunctionality Verify able to copy and paste math equations inside sample layer 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on activity 3. Click on create new 4. Choose "Math" 5. Select "Activity " from task list 6. Enter data's for all manadatory fields 7. Add sample layer. 8. Inside sample layer, try adding components (text/image/etc.) 9.Publish the activity 10.Launch the activity in saltire as teacher review Math equations should display inside the sample layer
